zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor de Ferrers於1305年之後出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley8728歲，母親Hawise de Muscegros8723歲。她於1328年與Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年9月17日在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯，埋葬在英國藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor de Ferrers于1305年之后出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley8728岁，母亲Hawise de Muscegros8723岁。她于1328年与Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年9月17日在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯，埋葬在英国藍卡爾拉堂姆 聖 詹姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor de Ferrers was born after 1305, in Staffordshire, England, her father, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, was 8728 and her mother, Hawise de Muscegros, was 8723. She married Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight in 1328, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 17 September 1381, in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Lathom St James, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor de Ferrers est née après 1305, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, avait 8728 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Muscegros, avait 8723 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight en 1328, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 17 septembre 1381, à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Lathom St James, Lancashire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Ferrersが1305年以後にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartleyは8728歳，母Hawise de Muscegrosは8723歳であった。1328年にイギリスランカシュアイアでSir Thomas de Lathom, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1381年9月17日にイギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアラソム スト ジャムスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor de Ferrers(이)가 1305년 이후 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 8728세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de Muscegros(은)는 8723세였다. 그녀는 1328년 영국 랭카실르에서 Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 9월 17일 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 래톰 스트 자메스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor de Ferrers nasceu após 1305, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 8728 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Muscegros, tinha 8723 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight em 1328, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1381, em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Lathom St James, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor de Ferrers родилась после 1305 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Ferrers 1st Baron Ferrers of Chartley было 8728 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Muscegros, 8723. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas de Lathom, Knight в 1328 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 17 сентября 1381 г. в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия и была похоронена в местности латом ст джемесь, ланкашир, Англия.
